sections.heading: Service Availability during the Annual Spring Festival
sections.text: Service Availability during the Annual Spring Festival Press Release Jan 27, 2026 Table of Contents Available Services During Spring Festival Holiday Order Placement Notes The Spring Festival (Lunar New Year) is approaching, and we are so grateful for your support over the past year. The Spring Festival holiday will span from February 10 to February 23 . JLC will continue to support your manufacturing needs during the Spring Festival holiday. We will provide the same high-quality manufacturing services for PCB, PCBA, 3D Printing, CNC machining, and mechatronic parts sourcing , and more . Below are the available services during the holiday, along with the production and shipping schedule. We...

sections.heading: Available Services During Spring Festival Holiday
sections.text: The Spring Festival (Lunar New Year) is approaching, and we are so grateful for your support over the past year. The Spring Festival holiday will span from February 10 to February 23 . JLC will continue to support your manufacturing needs during the Spring Festival holiday. We will provide the same high-quality manufacturing services for PCB, PCBA, 3D Printing, CNC machining, and mechatronic parts sourcing , and more . Below are the available services during the holiday, along with the production and shipping schedule. We recommend scheduling order placement in advance to help ensure timely project completion. Production & Shipping Schedule: Order Placement Schedule (For Reference): Availab...
